title: achnatherum coreanum var. kengii
intro: Achnatherum coreanum var. kengii, also known as Korean feather grass, is a type of grass native to China and Korea, characterized by its slender stems and feathery foliage. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Korean feather grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Korean feather grass can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
